2606.05569.title: Domain-Aware Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis Using Language-Specific Statistical Graphs
2606.05569.paper_summary: Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis (MDD) has gained increasing importance in computer-assisted language learning and speech technology in recent years. In this paper, we propose a method for constructing statistical graphs that enable models to learn phoneme confusion patterns represented as directed graphs. Furthermore, we introduce a language-specific strategy to capture systematic pronunciation differences across various native language (L1) backgrounds. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through extensive experiments on the L2-ARCTIC benchmark, where it achieves an F1-score of 59.52%, outperforming several competitive baselines.
2606.05569.paper_summary_zh: 誤發音檢測與診斷（MDD）在近年來的電腦輔助語言學習和語音技術中變得越來越重要。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種構建統計圖的方法，使模型能夠學習以有向圖表示的音素混淆模式。<lb/>此外，我們引入了一種特定於語言的策略，以捕捉不同母語（L1）背景下的系統性發音差異。<lb/>我們的方法的有效性通過在L2-ARCTIC基準上的廣泛實驗得以證明，該方法達到了59.52%的F1分數，超越了幾個競爭基準。
2606.05569.author: Huu Tuong Tu et.al.
2606.05569.authors: Huu Tuong Tu, Hanh Nguyen, Thien Van Luong, Nguyen Tien Cuong, Vu Huan, Nguyen Thi Thu Trang
